name: source-check-max
description: High-stakes dual-verifier extension to source-check. For each factual citation, spawns TWO independent verifiers — V1 fetches the URL the agent cited; V2 receives only author+year+title and must independently rediscover the source (with metadata gate). Outputs combined via an 8-state headline table. Use for legal / medical / financial / regulatory citations where fabrication has material cost. REQUIRES source-check plugin installed alongside.
